# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with additional EBS volumes for application data (quick-start, minimal features)

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
  SubnetIds:
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>
    Description: Subnets where instances will be launched (one per instance, in order).
  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 6
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI for the instances (e.g., latest Amazon Linux 2023).
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
  AllowedSshCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
  DataVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 1
  DataVolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues: [gp3, gp2, io1, io2, st1, sc1, standard]
  RootVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    MinValue: 8
  DataDeviceName:
    Type: String
    Default: /dev/xvdb
  AppMountPoint:
    Type: String
    Default: /data
  InstanceNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: app-node
  DataVolumeNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: app-data

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]
  CreateNode2: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 2], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]]
  CreateNode3: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]]
  CreateNode4: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]]
  CreateNode5: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]]
  CreateNode6: !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow SSH inbound; allow all egress
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSshCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'

  Node1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Select [0, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref InstanceSecurityGroup]
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euxo pipefail
          DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
          MNT="${AppMountPoint}"
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then break; fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! blkid "$DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            mkfs -t xfs "$DEVICE"
          fi
          mkdir -p "$MNT"
          UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
          grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID $MNT xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          mount -a
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user "$MNT" || true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${InstanceNamePrefix}-1'

  Node1DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Node1.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${DataVolumeNamePrefix}-1'

  Node1DataAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref Node1
      VolumeId: !Ref Node1DataVolume

  Node2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateNode2
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Select [1, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref InstanceSecurityGroup]
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euxo pipefail
          DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
          MNT="${AppMountPoint}"
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then break; fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! blkid "$DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            mkfs -t xfs "$DEVICE"
          fi
          mkdir -p "$MNT"
          UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
          grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID $MNT xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          mount -a
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user "$MNT" || true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${InstanceNamePrefix}-2'

  Node2DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateNode2
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Node2.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${DataVolumeNamePrefix}-2'

  Node2DataAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateNode2
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref Node2
      VolumeId: !Ref Node2DataVolume

  Node3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateNode3
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Select [2, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref InstanceSecurityGroup]
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euxo pipefail
          DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
          MNT="${AppMountPoint}"
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then break; fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! blkid "$DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            mkfs -t xfs "$DEVICE"
          fi
          mkdir -p "$MNT"
          UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
          grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID $MNT xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          mount -a
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user "$MNT" || true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${InstanceNamePrefix}-3'

  Node3DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateNode3
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Node3.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${DataVolumeNamePrefix}-3'

  Node3DataAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateNode3
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref Node3
      VolumeId: !Ref Node3DataVolume

  Node4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateNode4
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Select [3, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref InstanceSecurityGroup]
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euxo pipefail
          DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
          MNT="${AppMountPoint}"
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then break; fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! blkid "$DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            mkfs -t xfs "$DEVICE"
          fi
          mkdir -p "$MNT"
          UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
          grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID $MNT xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          mount -a
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user "$MNT" || true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${InstanceNamePrefix}-4'

  Node4DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateNode4
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Node4.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${DataVolumeNamePrefix}-4'

  Node4DataAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateNode4
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref Node4
      VolumeId: !Ref Node4DataVolume

  Node5:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateNode5
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Select [4, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref InstanceSecurityGroup]
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euxo pipefail
          DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
          MNT="${AppMountPoint}"
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then break; fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! blkid "$DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            mkfs -t xfs "$DEVICE"
          fi
          mkdir -p "$MNT"
          UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
          grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID $MNT xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          mount -a
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user "$MNT" || true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${InstanceNamePrefix}-5'

  Node5DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateNode5
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Node5.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${DataVolumeNamePrefix}-5'

  Node5DataAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateNode5
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref Node5
      VolumeId: !Ref Node5DataVolume

  Node6:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateNode6
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Select [5, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref InstanceSecurityGroup]
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euxo pipefail
          DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
          MNT="${AppMountPoint}"
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then break; fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! blkid "$DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            mkfs -t xfs "$DEVICE"
          fi
          mkdir -p "$MNT"
          UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
          grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID $MNT xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          mount -a
          chown ec2-user:ec2-user "$MNT" || true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${InstanceNamePrefix}-6'

  Node6DataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateNode6
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Node6.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${DataVolumeNamePrefix}-6'

  Node6DataAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateNode6
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref Node6
      VolumeId: !Ref Node6DataVolume

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  Node1InstanceId:
    Value: !Ref Node1
  Node1PrivateIp:
    Value: !GetAtt Node1.PrivateIp
  Node2InstanceId:
    Condition: CreateNode2
    Value: !Ref Node2
  Node2PrivateIp:
    Condition: CreateNode2
    Value: !GetAtt Node2.PrivateIp
  Node3InstanceId:
    Condition: CreateNode3
    Value: !Ref Node3
  Node3PrivateIp:
    Condition: CreateNode3
    Value: !GetAtt Node3.PrivateIp
  Node4InstanceId:
    Condition: CreateNode4
    Value: !Ref Node4
  Node4PrivateIp:
    Condition: CreateNode4
    Value: !GetAtt Node4.PrivateIp
  Node5InstanceId:
    Condition: CreateNode5
    Value: !Ref Node5
  Node5PrivateIp:
    Condition: CreateNode5
    Value: !GetAtt Node5.PrivateIp
  Node6InstanceId:
    Condition: CreateNode6
    Value: !Ref Node6
  Node6PrivateIp:
    Condition: CreateNode6
    Value: !GetAtt Node6.PrivateIp
